description: Temple certification rules, ethics watchlist, and invariant validation
certification_rules: TempleRite quests require ethical certification before evaluation
Certification is granted by a minimum quorum of 3 temple witnesses
All temple witnesses must have at least one SEALED quest at unlock_level >= 8
Certification expires after 13 epochs and must be renewed
A player with any active ethics watchlist entry cannot receive certification

ethics_watchlist.description: Players or agents flagged for ethical review
entry_criteria: 3 or more DISPUTED quests within a 21-epoch window
Any quest where witness bundle contains majority DISPUTE attestations
Manual flag by a Policy Forum (S18) governance decision
Repeated submission of identical failed quests (3+ resubmissions)
removal_criteria: Successful completion of an ethics review quest at S08
Policy Forum (S18) governance decision to remove
watchlist_effects: Cannot serve as witness for any quest
Payout multiplier reduced to 0.382 (phi^-2) for all quest classes

invariant_validation.description: Invariants that must hold for all temple-certified quests

invariants.name: Element balance
invariants.rule: Element vector sum must be within 0.01 of the station definition

invariants.name: Determinism check
invariants.rule: Replay bundle must produce identical outcome_hash on re-execution

invariants.name: Witness quorum
invariants.rule: Witness bundle must contain at least min_witness_quorum CONFIRMs

invariants.name: Ethics clearance
invariants.rule: Submitting player must not be on ethics watchlist

invariants.name: Timestamp monotonicity
invariants.rule: All timestamps in the quest chain must be strictly increasing

invariants.name: Capsule reference validity
invariants.rule: All referenced capsules must exist in the 198-226 range

severity_levels.SOFT: Violation triggers warning and requires manual review
